assets.name: lecture_07_figure_02.png
assets.rationale: This is the clearest and most useful frame in the window. The blackboard content is fully legible, the abstract setup is cleanly staged, and Susskind has moved far enough left that his hands no longer interfere with the equation. The neighboring frames are slightly more occluded or visually busier.

assets.name: lecture_07_figure_03.png
assets.rationale: This is the clearest and most complete frame in the window. The worked-example Hamiltonian is already written and the first phase-space velocity relation is fully legible, while Susskind is still far enough left not to block the board. The later candidates are dominated by the act of writing and leave the new material incomplete or more heavily occluded.
